chunks.title: Warning Against Pride
chunks.reason: Moses exhorts Israel to remember God's power and their own lack of righteousness.

chunks.title: The Golden Calf Incident
chunks.reason: Moses recounts the history of Israel's rebellion at Horeb and his intercession.

chunks.title: Summary of Rebellions
chunks.reason: A brief list of previous locations where Israel provoked God.

chunks.title: Moses' Final Intercession
chunks.reason: Moses pleads with God to spare the people based on His covenant and reputation.
